title: Native Pi TUI worker timeout proof
goal: Prove that KD can time out and clean up a real Herdr-hosted native Pi TUI worker that does not submit an accepted result artifact in time.
acceptance: Document a real KD run started with --experimental-pi-tui-worker and a deliberately tiny worker_attempt_timeout_seconds value, including the exact temporary config or command setup used and the run id.
Evidence includes cockpit_worker_ready.source_of_truth = kd_tui_result_artifact, a worker_attempt_timeout event, terminal failed/blocked status, and a final-report/incident timeout reason.
Evidence shows no accepted worker success result was used after timeout and the Herdr pane id from cockpit_worker_ready is closed or absent from herdr pane list.
The proof document states what timeout cleanup proves and does not prove.
must_ask_if: The timeout proof would require leaving worker_attempt_timeout_seconds permanently changed in .workflow/khazad.json.
The worker submits a valid complete result before timeout, making the proof invalid.
